user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter class change requests by status, so that I can focus on items in a particular stage
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Class Change Employees List; When I select a status such as Pending approval or Approved; Then only requests with that status are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search and reset the class change list, so that I can quickly find or clear results
acceptance_criteria: Given I have chosen filter criteria; When I click Search; Then the matching records are displayed; And clicking Reset clears the filters

user_story: As a Manager, I want to review original vs destination employee class and department and position changes, so that I can understand each proposed move
acceptance_criteria: Given a class change request is listed; When I view its row; Then I can see original and destination class, old and new department, and old and new position

user_story: As an approver, I want to act on class change requests pending with me via the Task column, so that I can approve or reject them
acceptance_criteria: Given a request has status Pending with me; When I open its Task action; Then I can approve, reject, or cancel the class change

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to track cancelled and rejected class changes, so that I can audit outcomes
acceptance_criteria: Given class change requests exist; When I filter by Rejected or Cancelled; Then the corresponding requests are shown with their status
